LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT UNITED COMMERCIAL BANK'S MOTION FOR ORDER EXPUNGING LIS PENDENS IS GRANTED. THE COURT TOOK JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE NOTICE OF TRUSTEE'S SALE TO TAKE PLACE ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2008. THE COURT ALSO GRANTED ATTORNEY'S FEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,240.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MARTIN ENG'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 3 0 2 TO BE HEARD ON NOVEMBER 13, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARTIN ENG MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED SO THAT, IF HE WISHES, PLAINTIFF MAY WITHIN TEN DAYS ADD A NEW CLAIM FOR BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING AND/OR UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES, BUT NOT A CLAIM FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR #7235

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint Supporting Declaration Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MARTIN ENG Motion to Amend Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for leave to amend is granted so that, if he wishes, plaintiff may within ten days add a new claim for breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and/or unfair business practices, but not a claim for breach of fiduciary duty. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint Supporting Declaration Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Continued To Nov-13-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF MARTIN ENG'S Motion To Amend Complaint IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 3 0 2 TO BE HEARD ON NOVEMBER 13, 2009. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Consolidation Of Actions
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT UNITED COMMERCIAL BANK'S Motion For Consolidation Of Actions IS TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 302 WITH MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IN CASE NUMBER 479286. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen CSR# 8189 301/PJB

Notice Of And Motion Motion For Order Expunging Lis Pendens, Supporting, Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. DENNIS YAN, TEL. NO. 867-5797 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL R. PERDUE, TEL. NO. 291-0474 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - THE COURT APOLOGIZED TO THE PARTIES AND MOVED ON TO HEAR THE MATTER SINCE THERE WAS A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE ORDER SHORTENING TIME. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT UNITED COMMERCIAL BANK'S Motion For Order Expunging Lis Pendens IS GRANTED. THE COURT TOOK JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE NOTICE OF TRUSTEE'S SALE TO TAKE PLACE ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2008. THE COURT ALSO GRANTED ATTORNEY'S FEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,240.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Nichole Rodich CSR# 11604 =301/PJB
